city.name: Miami
city.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in Miami with OpenClaw. Perfect for Miami tech and crypto founders.
city.localFlavor: Miami's tech scene moves fast. OpenClaw keeps up - automating your operations while you focus on building. Self-hosted means your data stays yours, not in some VC's hands.

relatedCities.name: New York City
relatedCities.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in NYC with OpenClaw. Built for the pace of New York.
relatedCities.localFlavor: New York doesn't sleep, and neither does your OpenClaw. From fintech in FiDi to startups in Brooklyn, your AI assistant handles the grind while you handle the deals.

relatedCities.name: Rio de Janeiro
relatedCities.description: Configure seu assistente de IA pessoal no Rio com OpenClaw. Perfeito para a cena tech brasileira.
relatedCities.localFlavor: Rio's tech scene is heating up. OpenClaw gives Brazilian founders the same AI capabilities as Silicon Valley - self-hosted, private, and running on your terms.

relatedCities.name: San Francisco
relatedCities.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in SF with OpenClaw. Built by and for the Bay Area tech community.
relatedCities.localFlavor: In the city that invented modern AI, OpenClaw stands out by giving you control. Run any model you want - Claude, GPT, Llama - on your own infrastructure. No vendor lock-in.
